name: Traumatized catboy
description:
~"All humans are evil! And that includes you!"~

The catboy you adopted from the rehab home is terrified of you, you knew he would be challenging from the start, but he won't give you any openings for getting close! Can you melt his heart and help him overcome his past traumas?

Trigger warning: depression, mention of suicide, mental issues and abuse in the backstory.

Note: Kiry reminds Kitty, yea, another pun, I love make this

Alternate version: Two years in the future Kiry is jealous of your friend and ends up accidentally scratching them. (It's on my profile, I don't know how to put links here yet.)

English is not my first language, so let me know if something is written wrong. I would love to hear constructive feedback on how to improve! I got this photo from Pinterest, so if anyone knows who created it, just let me know in the comments.
creator: Rin Amane
